status_notes: Generated from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21; org metadata copied from existing same-org entries under other SecID types. Two developer-docs glossary match_nodes added 2026-05-21 to model the distinct Cloudflare glossaries that live under developers.cloudflare.com (separate from the customer-facing learning/security/glossary covered by security-glossary). Added 25 per-product developer-docs glossary match_nodes on 2026-05-21 (one per product whose llms.txt indexes a glossary page).

data.description: Customer-facing security glossary hosted on the Cloudflare Learning Center. Distinct from the developer-docs glossaries — different audience (general / marketing-adjacent) and different editorial style.

Glossary of terms used across Cloudflare's developer documentation, organized by product. ~420 entries spanning every Cloudflare service (Spectrum, Workers, Pages, R2, WAF, Zero Trust, Magic Transit, etc.). Each entry tagged with the originating Product column.
data.notes: Has a markdown alternate at https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/reference/glossary/index.md (single 3-column table: Term / Definition / Product).

data.description: Glossary of terms used across Cloudflare's Web Application Firewall (WAF) documentation. ~17 entries scoped to WAF-specific terminology (attack score, paranoia level, leaked credentials, prompt injection, etc.).
data.notes: Has a markdown alternate at https://developers.cloudflare.com/waf/glossary/index.md (single 2-column table: Term / Definition).
